basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) Project Research Scientist I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Bhopal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Bhopal Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates will be applicable as per rule.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees/for Engineering / IT / CS - Four Years Graduate degree.
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees/for Engineering / IT / CS - Four Years Graduate degree.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bhopal Project Research Scientist-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Bhopal Project Research Scientist-I position is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-I position at AIIMS Bhopal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Post Graduate Degree, including integrated PG degrees, or a Four Years Graduate degree for Engineering, IT, or CS disciplines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST candidates as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 56,000 per month plus 20% HRA, totaling Rs. 67,200 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for AIIMS Bhopal Project Research Scientist-I recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply by sending their complete application along with required documents via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position, not a permanent government job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section on this page.
